title: wedelia filipes
intro: Wedelia filipes, also known as small yellow flower or Wedelia, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Wedelia filipes include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions. In traditional medicine, Wedelia filipes is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or topical application, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
